promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver — both parties waive right to jury trial in all litigation involving the franchise agreement
Punitive damages waiver — both parties waive right to punitive/exemplary damages
General release on FA execution — franchisee releases all pre-existing claims (except FDD representations) upon signing
All HFH assets and franchise contracts are pledged as collateral for Hilton's debt obligations (maturing 2025-2033)
Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired in May 2024 for ~$85M, accounted for as asset acquisition with 15-year useful life
Entity is tax-transparent — disregarded for US income tax purposes; all items flow through to Hilton
Confidentiality of negotiated terms — franchisee may not disclose negotiated FA terms without consent; violation is a default
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report — new from depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Consent limited remedy — franchisee cannot claim money damages for unreasonably withheld consent; sole remedy is specific performance or declaratory judgment
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report — new from depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Economic conditions not a defense — general economic downturn or financial inability is not a defense to breach
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report — new from depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: FTC exemption acknowledgment — franchisee acknowledges investment exceeds $1,469,600 FTC exemption threshold

promoted_facts.fact: Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate provides for reasonable fee compensation but no compensation was actually paid in any of 2022, 2023, or 2024
